With Pratt now ready to come
back into the fold, the day labor
proposition is a foregone conclu-
sion, The lineup of the council is
six democrats and four republicans.
Pratt siding with the republicans
made 1t impossible to secure a ma
jority. but with his vote next Tues
day night the proposition can be
put through.


Mayor Daggett today said that
the Washington Water Power COM
pany would pay for half the cost
of building the new concrete spans
ON Howard street. There will be
the south span and the north span.
The middle span will be left as it
is, as II has been so thoroughly re-
inforced that 1t is considered good
enough. The city will bear all the
expense of the "Y" bridge on Hav-
ermale street, as the power COM
pany does not use it.
